message:
feat(provider-test): add provider-matrix smoke harness (bd-3uqg.8.4)

Exercises route selection, auth extraction, and baseline request assembly
across the full 85-provider matrix through mock HTTP. 105 tests cover
openai-completions (64+), anthropic-messages (8), plus native baselines
for OpenAI responses, Gemini, Cohere, and Bedrock. Generates structured
JSON smoke report artifact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
